title: HPPTCL Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 25 Apprentice Trainee Posts
description: The Himachal Pradesh Power Transmission Corporation Limited (HPPTCL) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 25 Apprentice Trainee Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Diploma, B.E./B. Tech in Electrical, Computer Science, Civil Engineering, Any Degree, MCA can apply for the HPPTCL Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in ...
